name: algebra
description: A protocol for initializing and executing basic algebraic equation solving steps.

steps.name: Initialize Activity
steps.description: The system registers the initial raw activity log entry to begin the algebraic problem-solving process.

checklist.description: Initial activity log entry is registered in the system.

failure_conditions.trigger_description: System fails to register the initial activity log entry.
failure_conditions.mitigation_instruction: Please restart the session or check your connection to initialize the activity log.
